summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShelterLink calendar blocking functionality. Backend APIs for calendar blocking work perfectly. Frontend calendar picker opens successfully with react-day-picker integration, shows blocked dates warning, but calendar navigation and date blocking visualization need refinement.

ui_bugs.issue: Calendar opens to April 2026 instead of current month/year, making it difficult to navigate to months with blocked dates
Blocked dates not visually distinguishable - no disabled styling visible in calendar
No available dates found for selection in current calendar view

integration_issues.issue: Calendar defaults to wrong year (2026) instead of current year (2025)

passed_tests: Calendar date picker opens when clicking check-in/check-out date buttons
Blocked dates warning message displays correctly
Check-in and check-out date inputs are clickable
Backend availability API returns blocked dates correctly
Backend accepted booking creates blocked dates
Forgot password link works on login page
Submit booking button exists and responds to date selection
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix calendar date picker initialization to show current month/year instead of April 2026. Ensure blocked dates are properly styled as disabled/greyed out in the calendar. Verify that past dates and blocked booking dates (Apr 15-20, 2025) are correctly disabled in the calendar picker.

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All calendar blocking APIs working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Calendar picker opens and shows warning, but date blocking visualization and navigation need fixes
